definition.name: square-hole
definition.definition: For r,s in A=Im P the PRODUCT HOLE is h_{r,s}:=r‚ąės-P(r‚ąės) in Ker P (the failure of A to be closed under the ambient product). The SQUARE HOLE is q_r:=P(r^2)-r^2 in Ker P; the polarised hole q_{r,s}:=P(r‚ąės)-r‚ąės=-h_{r,s}. Note P(h_{r,s})=P(r‚ąės)-P^2(r‚ąės)=0 since P^2=P, so h_{r,s} in Ker P. [def-square-hole]
